discountAccount.description: Indicates if the account is a discount account.

escrowAccount.description: Indicates if the account is a escrow account.

excludeFrom1099.description: Indicates if the account is excluded from 1099 tax forms.

excludeLateFee.description: Indicates if excluded from late fees.

rentAccount.description: Indicates if the account is a rent account.

taxAccount.description: Indicates if the account is a tax account.
